references.title: A Survey of Knowledge Tracing: Models, Variants, and Applications

annotations.text: Knowledge tracing is one of the fundamental tasks using student behavioral data in Learning Analytcs. In essence it aims to infer the knowledge state of a student and how it can be leveraged in problem-solving. The paper makes a survey on the evolving landscape of knowledge tracing.

Moreover, the paper introduces 2 open-source algorithms. The first downloads and preprocessing of KT-related datasets. Also EduKTM implements the most common KT models. Potential future directions are also discussed in the paper.
